_comment: Execution role for the Athena DynamoDB Connector Lambda (VisualizationStack). Deployed via SAR (AthenaDynamoDBConnector). These 4 managed policies are all required — the SAR connector's Java SDK makes S3, DynamoDB, Athena, and Glue calls that need broader access than inline policies alone provide. CDK creates this role automatically — this file is a reference and fallback.
_note: The inline policy statements below are kept for reference but the managed policies above are what actually resolved the bucket ownership and DynamoDB access errors. Attach all 4 managed policies to this role.
